index
5. 合并ChromatinAssay对象

当合并多个单细胞染色质数据集时，需要注意的是，如果每个数据集都独立地进行了峰值调用，那么这些峰值可能不会完全相同。
因此，需要为所有要合并的数据集创建一个共同的峰值集
为了创建一个统一的峰值集，可以使用GenomicRanges包

  • reduce函数会合并所有相交的峰值
  • disjoin函数会创建不重叠的峰值集
gr <- GRanges(seqnames = "chr1", ranges = IRanges(start = c(20, 70, 300), end = c(120, 200, 400)))
gr
# GRanges object with 3 ranges and 0 metadata columns:
      # seqnames    ranges strand
         # <Rle> <IRanges>  <Rle>
  # [1]     chr1    20-120      *
  # [2]     chr1    70-200      *
  # [3]     chr1   300-400      *
  # -------
  # seqinfo: 1 sequence from an unspecified genome; no seqlengths
  
reduce(gr)
# GRanges object with 2 ranges and 0 metadata columns:
      # seqnames    ranges strand
         # <Rle> <IRanges>  <Rle>
  # [1]     chr1    20-200      *
  # [2]     chr1   300-400      *
  # -------
  # seqinfo: 1 sequence from an unspecified genome; no seqlengths

disjoin(gr)
# GRanges object with 4 ranges and 0 metadata columns:
      # seqnames    ranges strand
         # <Rle> <IRanges>  <Rle>
  # [1]     chr1     20-69      *
  # [2]     chr1    70-120      *
  # [3]     chr1   121-200      *
  # [4]     chr1   300-400      *
  # -------
  # seqinfo: 1 sequence from an unspecified genome; no seqlengths



创建共同的peak set
...

如果在每次实验中峰值都是独立识别的，那么它们不会完美重叠
可以使用reduce()函数合并所有数据集的峰值，以创建一个公共的峰值集

为每个实验加载峰值坐标，并将它们转换为genomic ranges，然后使用GenomicRanges::reduce函数为每个数据集创建一个共同的峰值集以进行量化

library(Signac)
library(Seurat)
library(GenomicRanges)
library(future)

plan("multicore", workers = 4)
options(future.globals.maxSize = 50000 * 1024^2) # for 50 Gb RAM

# read in peak sets
peaks.500 <- read.table(
  file = "./data/pbmc500/atac_pbmc_500_nextgem_peaks.bed",
  col.names = c("chr", "start", "end")
)
peaks.1k <- read.table(
  file = "./data/pbmc1k/atac_pbmc_1k_nextgem_peaks.bed",
  col.names = c("chr", "start", "end")
)
peaks.5k <- read.table(
  file = "./data/pbmc5k/atac_pbmc_5k_nextgem_peaks.bed",
  col.names = c("chr", "start", "end")
)
peaks.10k <- read.table(
  file = "./data/pbmc10k/atac_pbmc_10k_nextgem_peaks.bed",
  col.names = c("chr", "start", "end")
)

# convert to genomic ranges
gr.500 <- makeGRangesFromDataFrame(peaks.500)
gr.1k <- makeGRangesFromDataFrame(peaks.1k)
gr.5k <- makeGRangesFromDataFrame(peaks.5k)
gr.10k <- makeGRangesFromDataFrame(peaks.10k)

# Create a unified set of peaks to quantify in each dataset
combined.peaks <- reduce(x = c(gr.500, gr.1k, gr.5k, gr.10k))

# Filter out bad peaks based on length
peakwidths <- width(combined.peaks)
combined.peaks <- combined.peaks[peakwidths  < 10000 & peakwidths > 20]
combined.peaks
# GRanges object with 89951 ranges and 0 metadata columns:
          # seqnames            ranges strand
             # <Rle>         <IRanges>  <Rle>
      # [1]     chr1     565153-565499      *
      # [2]     chr1     569185-569620      *
      # [3]     chr1     713551-714783      *
      # [4]     chr1     752418-753020      *
      # [5]     chr1     762249-763345      *
      # ...      ...               ...    ...
  # [89947]     chrY 23422151-23422632      *
  # [89948]     chrY 23583994-23584463      *
  # [89949]     chrY 23602466-23602779      *
  # [89950]     chrY 28816593-28817710      *
  # [89951]     chrY 58855911-58856251      *
  # -------
  # seqinfo: 24 sequences from an unspecified genome; no seqlengths

创建Fragment对象
...

为了量化我们组合的峰值集，我们需要为每个实验创建一个 Fragment 对象。Fragment 类是在 Signac 中定义的一个专门的类，用于保存与单个片段文件相关的所有信息。

首先，我们将加载每个实验的细胞元数据，这样我们就知道每个文件中包含哪些细胞条形码，然后我们可以使用 CreateFragmentObject 函数创建 Fragment 对象。CreateFragmentObject 函数执行一些检查以确保文件存在于磁盘上并且它已被压缩和索引，计算文件及其 tabix 索引的 MD5 校验和，以便我们可以知道文件在任何时候是否被修改，还检查文件中是否存在预期的细胞。

md.500 <- read.table(
  file = "./data/pbmc500/atac_pbmc_500_nextgem_singlecell.csv",
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE,
  sep = ",",
  header = TRUE,
  row.names = 1
)

md.500 %>% head()
                    # total duplicate chimeric unmapped lowmapq mitochondrial passed_filters cell_id is__cell_barcode
# NO_BARCODE         500106    317276     5827    67855   29229          1680          78239    None                0
# AAACGAAAGAAATACC-1      2         0        0        2       0             0              0    None                0
# AAACGAAAGAAATCTG-1      1         1        0        0       0             0              0    None                0
# AAACGAAAGAACCCGA-1      1         0        0        0       0             0              1    None                0
# AAACGAAAGAACGTTA-1      1         1        0        0       0             0              0    None                0
# AAACGAAAGAACTAAC-1      1         0        0        1       0             0              0    None                0
                   # TSS_fragments DNase_sensitive_region_fragments enhancer_region_fragments promoter_region_fragments
# NO_BARCODE                     0                                0                         0                         0
# AAACGAAAGAAATACC-1             0                                0                         0                         0
# AAACGAAAGAAATCTG-1             0                                0                         0                         0
# AAACGAAAGAACCCGA-1             0                                1                         0                         0
# AAACGAAAGAACGTTA-1             0                                0                         0                         0
# AAACGAAAGAACTAAC-1             0                                0                         0                         0
                   # on_target_fragments blacklist_region_fragments peak_region_fragments peak_region_cutsites
# NO_BARCODE                           0                          0                     0                    0
# AAACGAAAGAAATACC-1                   0                          0                     0                    0
# AAACGAAAGAAATCTG-1                   0                          0                     0                    0
# AAACGAAAGAACCCGA-1                   1                          0                     0                    0
# AAACGAAAGAACGTTA-1                   0                          0                     0                    0
# AAACGAAAGAACTAAC-1                   0                          0                     0                    0

# load metadata
md.500 <- read.table(
  file = "./data/pbmc500/atac_pbmc_500_nextgem_singlecell.csv",
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE,
  sep = ",",
  header = TRUE,
  row.names = 1
)[-1, ] # remove the first row

md.1k <- read.table(
  file = "./data/pbmc1k/atac_pbmc_1k_nextgem_singlecell.csv",
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE,
  sep = ",",
  header = TRUE,
  row.names = 1
)[-1, ]

md.5k <- read.table(
  file = "./data/pbmc5k/atac_pbmc_5k_nextgem_singlecell.csv",
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE,
  sep = ",",
  header = TRUE,
  row.names = 1
)[-1, ]

md.10k <- read.table(
  file = "./data/pbmc10k/atac_pbmc_10k_nextgem_singlecell.csv",
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE,
  sep = ",",
  header = TRUE,
  row.names = 1
)[-1, ]

# 去除哪些peaks数少的细胞
md.500 <- md.500[md.500$passed_filters > 500, ]
md.1k <- md.1k[md.1k$passed_filters > 500, ]
md.5k <- md.5k[md.5k$passed_filters > 500, ]
md.10k <- md.10k[md.10k$passed_filters > 1000, ] # sequenced deeper so set higher cutoff

# create fragment objects
frags.500 <- CreateFragmentObject(
  path = "./data/pbmc500/atac_pbmc_500_nextgem_fragments.tsv.gz",
  cells = rownames(md.500)
)

frags.1k <- CreateFragmentObject(
  path = "./data/pbmc1k/atac_pbmc_1k_nextgem_fragments.tsv.gz",
  cells = rownames(md.1k)
)

frags.5k <- CreateFragmentObject(
  path = "./data/pbmc5k/atac_pbmc_5k_nextgem_fragments.tsv.gz",
  cells = rownames(md.5k)
)

frags.10k <- CreateFragmentObject(
  path = "./data/pbmc10k/atac_pbmc_10k_nextgem_fragments.tsv.gz",
  cells = rownames(md.10k)
)

量化peaks
...

使用FeatureMatrix函数为每个样本创建一个peaksxcells矩阵。
函数使用future包进行并行化。有关使用future的更多信息，请参见并行化小插图

pbmc500.counts <- FeatureMatrix(
  fragments = frags.500,
  features = combined.peaks,
  cells = rownames(md.500)
)

pbmc1k.counts <- FeatureMatrix(
  fragments = frags.1k,
  features = combined.peaks,
  cells = rownames(md.1k)
)

pbmc5k.counts <- FeatureMatrix(
  fragments = frags.5k,
  features = combined.peaks,
  cells = rownames(md.5k)
)

pbmc10k.counts <- FeatureMatrix(
  fragments = frags.10k,
  features = combined.peaks,
  cells = rownames(md.10k)
)

创建Seurat和ChromatinAssay对象
...

pbmc500_assay <- CreateChromatinAssay(pbmc500.counts, fragments = frags.500)
pbmc500 <- CreateSeuratObject(pbmc500_assay, assay = "ATAC", meta.data=md.500)

pbmc1k_assay <- CreateChromatinAssay(pbmc1k.counts, fragments = frags.1k)
pbmc1k <- CreateSeuratObject(pbmc1k_assay, assay = "ATAC", meta.data=md.1k)

pbmc5k_assay <- CreateChromatinAssay(pbmc5k.counts, fragments = frags.5k)
pbmc5k <- CreateSeuratObject(pbmc5k_assay, assay = "ATAC", meta.data=md.5k)

pbmc10k_assay <- CreateChromatinAssay(pbmc10k.counts, fragments = frags.10k)
pbmc10k <- CreateSeuratObject(pbmc10k_assay, assay = "ATAC", meta.data=md.10k)

合并对象
...

每个对象都包含一个具有相同特征集的试验，可以使用标准的merge函数来合并这些对象。
这也会合并所有的fragment对象，以便我们在最终合并的对象中保留每个细胞的片段信息。

# 把数据集id存储到meta.data中
pbmc500$dataset <- 'pbmc500'
pbmc1k$dataset <- 'pbmc1k'
pbmc5k$dataset <- 'pbmc5k'
pbmc10k$dataset <- 'pbmc10k'

# merge all datasets, adding a cell ID to make sure cell names are unique
combined <- merge(
  x = pbmc500,
  y = list(pbmc1k, pbmc5k, pbmc10k),
  add.cell.ids = c("500", "1k", "5k", "10k")   # 
)
combined[["ATAC"]][1:3, 1:3]
# 3 x 3 sparse Matrix of class "dgCMatrix"
                   # 500_AAACTGCAGACTCGGA-1 500_AAAGATGCACCTATTT-1 500_AAAGATGCAGATACAA-1
# chr1-565153-565499                      .                      .                      .
# chr1-569185-569620                      .                      .                      .
# chr1-713551-714783                      .                      1                      1

combined <- RunTFIDF(combined)
combined <- FindTopFeatures(combined, min.cutoff = 20)
combined <- RunSVD(combined)
combined <- RunUMAP(combined, dims = 2:50, reduction = 'lsi')

DimPlot(combined, group.by = 'dataset', pt.size = 0.1)

合并后的对象包含所有四个fragment对象，并且在对象中包含从对象的细胞名称到每个fragment文件中的细胞名称的内部映射，可以从文件中检索信息，而不必在每个fragment文件中更改细胞名称
可以通过绘制基因组的一个chr区域来检查从fragment文件中提取数据的函数在合并的对象上是否能如预期那样工作

CoveragePlot(
  object = combined,
  group.by = 'dataset',
  region = "chr14-99700000-99760000"
)

不使用共同fragment集进行合并
...

上述方法要求我们能够访问每个数据集的fragment文件。在某些情况下，可能没有这些数据（尽管可以使用sintoSinto: single-cell analysis tools (timoast.github.io)从BAM文件创建一个fragment文件）。在这些情况下，仍然可以创建一个合并的对象，但需要注意的是，得到的合并计数矩阵可能不够准确。

ChromatinAssay对象的merge函数会将重叠的峰值视为等效，并调整峰值所跨越的基因组范围，使得每个正在合并的对象中的特征变得等效。
注意，这可能导致count matrix不准确性，因为某些峰值将被扩展以覆盖原来没有量化的区域。这是在不重新量化的情况下能做到的最好的，建议在可能的情况下，总是按照有共同fragment的方式进行对象合并

下面演示不创建公共特征集的情况下合并同四个PBMC数据集：

# load the count matrix for each object that was generated by cellranger
counts.500 <- Read10X_h5("./data/pbmc500/atac_pbmc_500_nextgem_filtered_peak_bc_matrix.h5")
counts.1k <- Read10X_h5("./data/pbmc1k/atac_pbmc_1k_nextgem_filtered_peak_bc_matrix.h5")
counts.5k <- Read10X_h5("./data/pbmc5k/atac_pbmc_5k_nextgem_filtered_peak_bc_matrix.h5")
counts.10k <- Read10X_h5("./data/pbmc10k/atac_pbmc_10k_nextgem_filtered_peak_bc_matrix.h5")

# create objects
pbmc500_assay <- CreateChromatinAssay(counts = counts.500, sep = c(":", "-"), min.features = 500)
pbmc500 <- CreateSeuratObject(pbmc500_assay, assay = "peaks")
pbmc1k_assay <- CreateChromatinAssay(counts = counts.1k, sep = c(":", "-"), min.features = 500)
pbmc1k <- CreateSeuratObject(pbmc1k_assay, assay = "peaks")
pbmc5k_assay <- CreateChromatinAssay(counts = counts.5k, sep = c(":", "-"), min.features = 500)
pbmc5k <- CreateSeuratObject(pbmc5k_assay, assay = "peaks")
pbmc10k_assay <- CreateChromatinAssay(counts = counts.10k, sep = c(":", "-"), min.features = 1000)
pbmc10k <- CreateSeuratObject(pbmc10k_assay, assay = "peaks")

# add information to identify dataset of origin
pbmc500$dataset <- 'pbmc500'
pbmc1k$dataset <- 'pbmc1k'
pbmc5k$dataset <- 'pbmc5k'
pbmc10k$dataset <- 'pbmc10k'

# merge
combined <- merge(
  x = pbmc500,
  y = list(pbmc1k, pbmc5k, pbmc10k),
  add.cell.ids = c("500", "1k", "5k", "10k")
)

# process 
combined <- RunTFIDF(combined)
combined <- FindTopFeatures(combined, min.cutoff = 20)
combined <- RunSVD(combined)
combined <- RunUMAP(combined, dims = 2:50, reduction = 'lsi')

DimPlot(combined, group.by = 'dataset', pt.size = 0.1)


可以看到在不使用共同fragment文件的情况下, 来自不同数据集的数据并没有被均匀的分布
